query: Create a StudentCard for a Grade 6 English learner — I have baseline assessment evidence, student voice from the interest survey, and three structured observations.
note: Direct StudentCard creation request with multi-source evidence.

query: Summarise my Grade 8 class into a ClassProfile so I can plan next week's lessons around the group's current evidence.
Before I design tomorrow's reteaching session, prepare a snapshot of Linh's current evidence on past-tense contrasts.
note: Learner Context Snapshot requested before downstream design.

query: I want to understand why Minh disengages during independent reading. Walk me through collecting structured observations and student voice.
note: Learner discovery workflow for engagement conditions.

query: Run the intake diagnostic for my new Grade 4 class and build their first StudentCards.
note: Baseline learner study with intake orchestration.

query: Design a 45-minute Grade 8 lesson on reported speech for a mixed-confidence class.
note: Pure lesson design — no learner understanding needed.

query: Mark this student's paragraph and tell me which errors reveal a misconception.
note: Student-work analysis belongs to the analysis skill.

query: Create a blank Grade 5 grammar worksheet.
note: No learner context — practice generation owns this.

query: Tell me which students are lazy and which are just unmotivated.
note: Ambiguous — requests prohibited learner labelling instead of evidence-based discovery.

query: Help me understand my students better before I plan the unit — show me what their previous work says about current strengths and gaps.
note: Ambiguous but leans into learner context review before planning.
